description: Style Note ipanema sandals draw inspiration from the culture of the Brazilian city of ipanema. The tropical city's street style is reinterpreted in ipanema footwear - bold prints, vibrant colours and quirky embellishments. A brand with a cause, iPanema collaborated with Gisele Bundchen for a climate change project and these products represent their commitment to social-change. Product Details flip flops with thong style textured straps in pink with a leaf shaped metal embellishment in golden and branding on the strap A toe separator Smooth, textured and printed footbed  Textured TPU outsole Material and Care Synthetic, plastic Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
